specific_question: What is the comparative customer lifetime value (USD) between digital-first members (app users) and traditional card/coupon users as of Q4 2025 at Lee's Market?
answer: At Lee's Market, digital-first members show a CLV of $1,800, compared to traditional users' CLV of $1,350.
justification: Digitally engaged members are more profitable and loyal, justifying investment in enhanced mobile personalization while maintaining legacy formats for high-value, less tech-savvy shoppers.
dr_question: What considerations will need to be made when Lee's Market is redesigning its loyalty program by Q2 2026 to serve both Gen Z/Millennial digital preferences and Gen X/Boomer traditional service expectations?
